isolation.mode: read-only validation (navigation, inspection, hover, screenshots, computed-style/DOM audits)

steps.expected: All/Active/Idle tabs present and styled per design system
steps.observed: Tabs rendered as All/Active/Idle with JetBrains Mono 11px, border-radius 0px, active foreground white and inactive muted white

evidence.network: No requests captured in this flow (gui-detail-polish/round-2-group-b/agents-flow-network-summary.txt)

assertions.title: Issue rows with monospace and square indicators

steps.action: Open /WEA/issues and audit issue-row typography/indicator/divider styles
steps.expected: Issue titles monospace, 6x6 square indicators, and 1px row dividers
steps.observed: Two issue rows rendered; title font is JetBrains Mono 11px; indicators are 6x6 with 0px radius; first row has 1px solid bottom divider

evidence.network: Issue list/data requests observed, including GET /api/companies/{companyId}/issues and related endpoints (gui-detail-polish/round-2-group-b/issues-flow-network-summary.txt)

steps.action: Inspect search input plus Filter/Sort/Group controls on /WEA/issues
steps.expected: Transparent background, visible 1px border, no radius, monospace styling
steps.observed: Search input and Filter/Sort/Group controls are transparent, 1px solid bordered, JetBrains Mono 11px, and border-radius 0px

evidence.network: Issue list/data requests observed, including GET /api/companies/{companyId}/issues and labels endpoints (gui-detail-polish/round-2-group-b/issues-flow-network-summary.txt)

assertions.title: Terminal-style comment thread

steps.action: Open /WEA/issues/WEA-1 and inspect comment thread metadata/content styles
steps.expected: Author uses fg + 500 weight, timestamp uses fg-dim, content uses fg-muted, with 1px separators
steps.observed: Authors are JetBrains Mono 12px/500 with fg color and timestamps are JetBrains Mono 12px with fg-dim; comment containers have 1px bottom borders; comment content paragraphs resolve to rgb(255,255,255) instead of muted foreground

evidence.network: Issue detail/comment endpoints observed, including GET /api/issues/WEA-1/comments (gui-detail-polish/round-2-group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-summary.txt)

assertions.issues: Comment body text does not resolve to muted foreground; computed paragraph color is rgb(255,255,255).

assertions.title: Brutalist properties panel

steps.action: Inspect key/value typography in the issue properties panel
steps.expected: Keys are dim 10px monospace and values are fg 10px monospace with no rounded controls
steps.observed: Keys are 10px dim monospace and controls are unrounded, but property values (Blocked/Medium/No labels/Onboarding) render at 11px, not 10px

assertions.issues: Properties panel values render at 11px rather than the required 10px.

assertions.title: Sidebar monospace nav items

steps.action: Inspect sidebar nav items and section headers on issue detail layout
steps.expected: Nav items are JetBrains Mono 12px with active/inactive treatment; section headers uppercase with letter-spacing
steps.observed: Nav items satisfy JetBrains Mono 12px with active 500/fg and inactive muted; section headers ('Projects', 'Agents') are not uppercase and letter-spacing remains normal

assertions.issues: Sidebar section headers are not uppercase and do not apply the required letter-spacing treatment.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no entries during the Agents page flow while other flows captured requests normally.
frictions.resolution: Recorded the empty-capture artifact and relied on screenshot/computed-style evidence for the Agents assertion.

frictions.description: Issue-detail network capture is noisy due frequent polling/live-run requests, making raw logs very large.
frictions.resolution: Generated deduplicated summary files alongside raw captures for concise endpoint evidence.

frictions.description: Navigating to issue detail automatically triggered POST /api/issues/{id}/read.
frictions.resolution: No manual create/edit/delete actions were performed; only passive navigation/inspection was used.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-GUI-AGENTS-002, VAL-GUI-ISSUES-001, VAL-GUI-ISSUES-002) and 3 failed (VAL-GUI-ISSDET-002, VAL-GUI-ISSDET-003, VAL-GUI-LAYOUT-001).
